candidate_set.source_description: Rule-based geometric baseline with explicit handover margins.
Learned proposal candidate with style and timing variation.
Geometric backbone with learned local refinement near handover.
Always-available conservative fallback with extra clearance and slower timing.

notes: Doorway case with safe fallback staying conservative while hybrid improves comfort.
